# commerce-changeset llms.txt

## Stack
Next.js 16.2.1 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript
Tailwind CSS v4 (CSS-based config, no JS config file)
Base UI + shadcn/ui + CVA for components
Auth0 v4 (@auth0/nextjs-auth0) for authentication
Vercel AI SDK (ai ^6.0.134) for model integration
@auth0/ai-vercel for Auth0-aware AI interactions
zod for schema validation
json-rules-engine for business rule evaluation

## Models
Vercel AI SDK provides the model integration layer.
@auth0/ai-vercel connects Auth0 sessions to AI interactions.
An Anthropic API key is configured for Claude model access.

## Endpoints
/auth/login        — Initiate Auth0 login (handled by middleware)
/auth/logout       — Initiate Auth0 logout (handled by middleware)
/auth/callback     — Auth0 callback after authentication (handled by middleware)
/api/auth/[auth0]  — Auth0 route handler (GET)

## Agent Instructions
AGENTS.md      — Comprehensive coding conventions, architecture, and examples
CONTRIBUTING.md — Branching, PR process, coding standards, review checklist
CLAUDE.md       — References @AGENTS.md for Claude Code agent behavior

## Prompt Conventions
Use zod schemas for all AI input/output validation.
Use json-rules-engine for business rule evaluation.
Validate AI-generated outputs with zod before use.
Server-side only for Auth0 session access (never in client components).
